data.body:
Twinkle! Bam-bam!

Nothing's impossible with love, courage, and the power of friendship! 💫

Sensei, the final coupon to top off the Magical Girl Heavy Caliber update celebration is here!

Don't forget to enter any previous coupons you may have missed too! 🪄

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3394597

#BlueArchive
